## Downloads

Raw files (base: `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ai-glasses-eyewear/ai-glasses-eyewear/main/`):

- Dataset (JSON): [`data/ai-glasses.json`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ai-glasses-eyewear/ai-glasses-eyewear/main/data/ai-glasses.json)
- Flat export (CSV): [`data/ai-glasses.csv`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ai-glasses-eyewear/ai-glasses-eyewear/main/data/ai-glasses.csv)
- JSON Schema: [`schema/ai-glasses.schema.json`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ai-glasses-eyewear/ai-glasses-eyewear/main/schema/ai-glasses.schema.json)
- Sources: [`data/sources.json`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ai-glasses-eyewear/ai-glasses-eyewear/main/data/sources.json)

## Checksums (SHA-256)

Regenerate with `scripts/checksums.sh` and paste the contents of `checksums.txt` here.

```text
<sha256>  data/ai-glasses.json
<sha256>  data/ai-glasses.csv
<sha256>  data/sources.json
<sha256>  schema/ai-glasses.schema.json
```

## How to cite

See [`CITATION.cff`](../CITATION.cff) in the repository, or use the "Cite this repository"
button on GitHub. Canonical database page: <https://ai-eyewear.ch/datenbank/>.
